sizing_rule.note: Adjust position sizing confidence based on trade sequence dependency (runs test Z-score). Negative Z indicates positive dependency (wins beget wins) → increase confidence/size. Positive Z indicates negative dependency (wins beget losses) → decrease confidence/size. Specific % adjustments not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Adjust position sizing based on trade sequence dependency analysis using the runs test Z-score to determine if wins beget wins or losses beget wins, affecting confidence in position sizing decisions.
